  "display name": "Academy Lockdown System",
  "description": "The academy’s lockdown is a system of artificery that covers the entire academy building. {
  "reference name": "JanTest",
  "display name": "Jan's Statement",
  "description": "Thirty minutes before the Ianus twins found the body, Bellwether walked past Jan in the west wing hallway. He was in her path, so she shoved him out of her way.   "school": "",

original:
House Frega was planning to fire Headmaster Theodore Redmond and replace him with Catherine Bellwether. They were also planning to fire all of the academy staff and replace them with Arcane Constructs.

This was supposed to be kept a secret. But according to Jan, Bellwether revealed this plan to the headmaster during a meeting a “few weeks ago”.

A rapier covered in blood. It was found in Wallace Nightgrave’s locker. Apparently, it’s a valuable family heirloom to House Frega. It was report stolen by Miriam Frega weeks before the murder.

Miriam’s dorm room is abjured against teleportation. So, the thief could only have broken into her room through nonmagical means.

{
  "reference name": "Logic",
  "display name": "Construct’s Logic Limitation",
  "description": "Arcane Constructs process tasks in the order that they are given. If a Construct is ordered to complete tasks A, B, and C, it will process each of those tasks individually. If task B is impossible, the Construct won’t realize this until it reaches task B. When it reaches task B, it will deem the entire series of commands as impossible and stop what it’s doing (without even attempting to complete task C).",
  "type": "",
  "school": "",
  "incantation": "",
  "gesture": "",
  "duration": "",
  "concentration": "",
  "series": "",
  "tag": "",
  "token position": "",
  "battle map size": ""
}

{
  "reference name": "Theory",
  "display name": "Steelwind's Deduction",
  "description": "The prosecution’s theory lays out the following timeline for Catherine Bellwether’s movements on the day of the murder.\r\n12:00pm-1:00pm: Theodore Redmond has a meeting with Bellwether.\r\n1:00pm: Miriam Frega saw Bellwether walking in the hallways.\r\n1:00pm-2:00pm: Bellwether spent time in the library.\r\n2:00pm-2:30pm: Wallace Nightgrave murdered Bellwether.\r\n2:30pm: Jan Hughes witnessed Bellwether walking towards Lecture Hall 2-B.\r\n3:00pm: The Ianus sisters discovered Bellwether’s body.  \r",
  "type": "",
  "school": "",
  "incantation": "",
  "gesture": "",
  "duration": "",
  "concentration": "",
  "series": "",
  "tag": "",
  "token position": "",
  "battle map size": ""
}

original:
The prosecution’s theory lays out the following timeline for Catherine Bellwether’s movements on the day of the murder.
12:00pm-1:00pm: Theodore Redmond has a meeting with Bellwether.
1:00pm: Miriam Frega saw Bellwether walking in the hallways.
1:00pm-2:00pm: Bellwether spent time in the library.
2:00pm-2:30pm: Wallace Nightgrave murdered Bellwether.
2:30pm: Jan Hughes witnessed Bellwether walking towards Lecture Hall 2-B.
3:00pm: The Ianus sisters discovered Bellwether’s body.

{
  "reference name": "Construct",
  "display name": "Arcane Constructs",
  "description": "Arcane Constructs are suits of armour that are animated using artificery. They can carry out simple tasks when ordered to. The ones in the Imperial Academy speak using the voice of Catherine Bellwether. These voice lines can only be changed or adjusted by the academy headmaster.\r\n\r\nEvery command given to a Construct is stored in its command log. However, this command log must be cleared regularly.\r",

  "school": "",

  "gesture": "",
  "duration": "",

  "series": "",
  "tag": "",
  "token position": "",
  "battle map size": ""
}
